docs.name: Shiny Text
docs.description: A shimmering highlight that continuously sweeps across text — perfect for hero taglines and call-to-action copy.

props.name: speed
props.description: Duration of one shimmer pass in seconds.

props.name: shimmerWidth
props.description: Width of the bright band as a percentage.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes (font size, weight, colour, etc.).

docs.overview: ShinyText adds a moving shimmer highlight that sweeps across your text using a CSS background-clip animation. Ideal for hero taglines, badge labels, or any copy that needs a premium metallic feel.

scenarios.title: Hero tagline highlight
scenarios.description: Draw attention to a key phrase in your hero section with a continuous shimmer sweep.

scenarios.title: Premium badge label
scenarios.description: Use a smaller shimmer span inside a pill badge to signal a paid or featured tier.

scenarios.title: CTA button text
scenarios.description: Give a call-to-action button a shimmering label to make it pop on dark landing pages.
